title: Im so tired of stupid sister.   Who sent me this txt yesterday morning.
body: How do you deal with this besides no conact. Ive lost 95 pounds and am fully supported by my doctors .  “Hey sis  im sorry to start ur day like this but get off Ozempic!....i now have 4 friends...including u who have/had breast cancer!   And all got it within 1 -2 yrs of being on Ozempic...please please stop it ok”
